examples: Looking gaunt and tired, he denied there was anything to worry about.
I know not what the younger dreams—some vague Utopia—and she seems, when withered old and skeleton-gaunt, an image of such politics.
During the conference, the party also announced that broadcaster and columnist Jon Gaunt had joined it.
Ben's widow, Kate, is nearby, bravely sculpting a huge, gaunt figure of Christ for the cathedral.
